use_cases: Form field selection for filtering or sorting data in dashboards
Navigation menus with hover or click-triggered dropdown options
Settings and preferences panel with grouped action items
User profile menus with account options and logout
Action menus for contextual operations like edit, delete, or share
ai_summary: A reusable basic dropdown component with flexible positioning options (align, side, placement), keyboard navigation support via custom hooks, smooth open/close animations using Framer Motion, and click-away detection to close when user interacts outside. Built with React Context for state management and composable sub-components (Trigger, Content, Item, Separator) for flexible menu construction.
